mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO match_post( matchno, memberno, cat_no, title, content, mdate, close_date, mplace, mplace_detail, lat, lng, dog_img, dmti, status, max_member, current_member, viewcnt, commentcnt, is_deleted, rdate )
VALUES( match_post_seq.nextval,
#{memberno},
#{cat_no},
#{title},
#{content},
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{mdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI' )
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{mdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' )
,
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{close_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI' )
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{close_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' )
,
#{mplace},
#{mplace_detail},
#{lat},
#{lng},
#{dog_img},
#{dmti},
#{status},
#{max_member},
#{current_member},
0,
0,
'N',
SYSDATE
)
mapper.update:
UPDATE match_post
SET
cat_no = #{cat_no},
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
mdate =
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{mdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI' )
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{mdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' )
,
close_date =
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{close_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI' )
TO_TIMESTAMP( #{close_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' )
,
mplace = #{mplace},
mplace_detail = #{mplace_detail},
lat = #{lat},
lng = #{lng},
dog_img = #{dog_img},
dmti = #{dmti},
max_member = #{max_member}
WHERE matchno = #{matchno}
mapper.select:
SELECT
m.matchno,
m.memberno,
m.cat_no,
m.title,
m.content,
TO_CHAR( m.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS mdate,
TO_CHAR( m.close_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS close_date,
m.mplace,
m.mplace_detail,
m.lat,
m.lng,
m.dog_img,
m.dmti,
m.status,
m.max_member,
m.current_member,
m.viewcnt,
m.commentcnt,
m.rdate,
b.nickname,
b.match_cnt,
NVL( ( SELECT AVG(owner_score) FROM match_review WHERE target_no = m.memberno ), 0 ) AS manner_score,
( SELECT MAX(content) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY mr.rdate DESC) FROM match_review mr WHERE mr.target_no = m.memberno ) AS review_content
FROM match_post m
INNER JOIN member b ON m.memberno = b.memberno
AND m.is_deleted = 'N'
AND m.cat_no = #{cat_no}
AND m.dmti = #{dmti_filter}
AND m.status = #{status_filter}
AND (
SELECT NVL(AVG(owner_score), 0)
FROM match_review
WHERE target_no = m.memberno
) >= 4.0
AND (
m.title LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
OR
m.content LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
)
ORDER BY
CASE
WHEN m.dmti = #{my_dbti} THEN 0
ELSE 1
END ASC,
NVL( ( SELECT AVG(owner_score) FROM match_review WHERE target_no = m.memberno ), 0 ) DESC,
m.matchno DESC
ABS(NVL(m.lat,0) - #{my_lat}) + ABS(NVL(m.lng,0) - #{my_lng}) ASC
m.matchno DESC

SELECT
matchno,
title,
mplace,
TO_CHAR( mdate, 'MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS mdate,
TO_CHAR( close_date, 'MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS close_date,
dog_img,
dmti
FROM match_post
WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY matchno DESC

SELECT
m.matchno,
m.memberno,
m.cat_no,
m.title,
m.content,
TO_CHAR( m.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS mdate,
TO_CHAR( m.close_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS close_date,
m.mplace,
m.mplace_detail,
m.lat,
m.lng,
m.dog_img,
m.dmti,
m.status,
m.max_member,
m.current_member,
m.viewcnt,
m.commentcnt,
m.rdate,
b.nickname,
b.match_cnt,
NVL( ( SELECT AVG(owner_score) FROM match_review WHERE target_no = m.memberno ), 0 ) AS manner_score,
( SELECT MAX(content) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY mr.rdate DESC) FROM match_review mr WHERE mr.target_no = m.memberno ) AS review_content
FROM match_post m
INNER JOIN member b ON m.memberno = b.memberno
WHERE m.matchno = #{matchno} AND m.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT
m.matchno,
m.memberno,
m.cat_no,
m.title,
m.content,
TO_CHAR( m.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS mdate,
TO_CHAR( m.close_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS close_date,
m.mplace,
m.lat,
m.lng,
m.dog_img,
m.dmti,
m.status,
m.viewcnt,
m.commentcnt,
m.rdate,
b.nickname
FROM match_post m
INNER JOIN member b ON m.memberno = b.memberno
WHERE m.memberno = #{memberno} AND m.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY m.matchno DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM match_post m
INNER JOIN member b ON m.memberno = b.memberno
AND m.is_deleted = 'N'
AND m.cat_no = #{cat_no}
AND m.dmti = #{dmti_filter}
AND (
SELECT NVL(AVG(owner_score), 0)
FROM match_review
WHERE target_no = m.memberno
) >= 4.0
AND (
m.title LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
OR
m.content LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
)
mapper.update:
UPDATE MATCH_POST
SET COMMENTCNT =
CASE
WHEN #{mode} = '+' THEN COMMENTCNT + 1
WHEN #{mode} = '-' THEN CASE WHEN COMMENTCNT > 0 THEN COMMENTCNT - 1 ELSE 0 END
END
WHERE MATCHNO = #{matchno}
